title: CT12 static tactic graph — Peeling loop
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT12 (Peeling loop). It requires the complete 16-node array in fixed source order from CT12.N01 through CT12.N16, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT12 (Peeling loop) tactic specification; must equal "CT12".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N01, "Definition — saturated branch state with routed load L", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N01, "Definition — saturated branch state with routed load L"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N01, "Definition — saturated branch state with routed load L"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N02, "Definition — well-founded measure M(L)∈N", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N02, "Definition — well-founded measure M(L)∈N"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N02, "Definition — well-founded measure M(L)∈N"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is a peeling exit triggered?", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is a peeling exit triggered?"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is a peeling exit triggered?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N04, "Lemma — unsaturated discharge inequality", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N04, "Lemma — unsaturated discharge inequality"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N04, "Lemma — unsaturated discharge inequality"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N05, "C4 — unsaturated branch", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N05, "C4 — unsaturated branch"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N05, "C4 — unsaturated branch"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N06, "Lemma — per-pass peel removes one routed unit", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N06, "Lemma — per-pass peel removes one routed unit"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N06, "Lemma — per-pass peel removes one routed unit"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N07, "Lemma — branch state restored and new demands paid?", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N07, "Lemma — branch state restored and new demands paid?"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N07, "Lemma — branch state restored and new demands paid?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N08, "Scope candidate — load not measurable — scope audit", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N08, "Scope candidate — load not measurable — scope audit"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N08, "Scope candidate — load not measurable — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N09, "Routing theorem — why did restoration fail?", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N09, "Routing theorem — why did restoration fail?"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N09, "Routing theorem — why did restoration fail?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N10, "Lemma — strict decrease M(L')<M(L)", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N10, "Lemma — strict decrease M(L')<M(L)"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N10, "Lemma — strict decrease M(L')<M(L)"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N11, "Payload record — restored state with new demand", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N11, "Payload record — restored state with new demand"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N11, "Payload record — restored state with new demand"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N12, "Routing theorem — what repair data is present?", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N12, "Routing theorem — what repair data is present?"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N12, "Routing theorem — what repair data is present?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_12→4 — ordinary demand", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_12→4 — ordinary demand"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_12→4 — ordinary demand"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N14, "Payload lemma — build P_12→13 — tier interaction", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N14, "Payload lemma — build P_12→13 — tier interaction"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N14, "Payload lemma — build P_12→13 — tier interaction"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N15, "CT 4 — charging", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N15, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N15, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT12.N16, "CT 13 — tiered charging", in CT12 (Peeling loop); must equal "CT12.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT12.N16, "CT 13 — tiered charging"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT12.N16, "CT 13 — tiered charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT12 (Peeling loop); must contain exactly 16 generic node objects in source order from CT12.N01 through CT12.N16, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
